name: CITIUS ONCOLOGY, INC.
summary: PART I Business Overview The Company, headquartered in Cranford, New Jersey, is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative targeted oncology therapies. The Companys strategy centers on achieving a market leading position by advancing innovative therapies with reduced development and clinical risks, and competitive advantages supported by intellectual property and regulatory exclusivity protection.
